headline: $100 Invested In This Stock Over The Last 15 Years, Would Be Worth This Much
summary: Costco Wholesale (NASDAQ:COST) has outperformed the market over the past 15 years by 8.72% on an annualized basis.

headline: EV Week In Review: Double Crown For Tesla's Musk, Rivian's Q3 Spooks Investors, Toyota Charts Out Ambitious EV Plan, Arrival Out With Its Prototype And More
summary: Stung by the broader market weakness and deterioration in sentiment toward Chinese stocks, the EV sector closed the week ending Dec. 17 mostly in the red. Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) came under selling pressure amid further stock sales by CEO Elon Musk.

summary: In a recent blog post Cathie Wood, the founder and CEO of Ark Investment Management, said that innovation stocks are in “deep value territory”.
